title: Lead SEO Specialist at Rivigo South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Rivigo South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rivigo South Asia Partners family as a SEO Specialist in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
